title: To redesignate certain facilities at Paterson Great Falls National Historical Park in honor of Congressman Bill Pascrell, Jr.
plain_summary: This bill changes the names of two places at Paterson Great Falls National Historical Park in New Jersey to honor Congressman Bill Pascrell, Jr. The Great Falls Scenic Overlook Trail Bridge will now be called the Bill Pascrell, Jr. Scenic Overlook Trail Bridge. Overlook Park will be renamed Bill Pascrell, Jr. Overlook Park. All government papers and documents will use these new names from now on.
last_action_text: Committee on Energy and Natural Resources Subcommittee on National Parks. Hearings held.

sections.title: Section 1  Redesignation of Paterson Great Falls NHP Facilities
sections.text: This section renames two places at Paterson Great Falls National Historical Park to honor Congressman Bill Pascrell, Jr. The Great Falls Scenic Overlook Trail Bridge will now be called the Bill Pascrell, Jr. Scenic Overlook Trail Bridge. The Overlook Park will now be called the Bill Pascrell, Jr. Overlook Park. From now on, whenever any government law, map, rule, document, paper, or other official record mentions the Great Falls Scenic Overlook Trail Bridge, it will mean the Bill Pascrell, Jr. Scenic Overlook Trail Bridge. The same applies to any mention of Overlook Park, which will now mean Bill Pascrell, Jr. Overlook Park.
